subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In this mighty Cycle and bountiful Age, distinguished women have been raised up to exalted stations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این کور عظیم و دور کریم حضرات نساء بشانی عظیم مبعوث شدند بعضی
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @call to action
